# F064 Train-Heldout Selector Audit

## Decision
`F064_TRAIN_SELECTOR_OVERFITS_CONTINUOUS_TRANSITION_GAINS`

## Purpose
F063 selected nonzero residuals using train-only cone and row-wise abstention metrics, but held-out scoring fell below the protected floor. F064 is a read-only audit of that train-to-held-out mismatch.

## Mean Metrics
- train safe nonzero fraction: `1.000000`
- selected nonzero fraction: `1.000000`
- heldout local floor preserved: `False`
- active gates pass: `True`
- broken rows: `0`
- train transition gap: `0.001412`
- heldout transition gap: `-0.000882`
- mean transition generalization gap: `-0.002294`
- train delta gap: `0.001697`
- heldout delta gap: `-0.000082`
- mean delta generalization gap: `-0.001779`
- train/heldout transition gap correlation: `-0.710630`
- train/heldout delta gap correlation: `-0.277384`
- train-positive heldout-negative transition seeds: `1`
- train-positive heldout-negative delta seeds: `1`

## Interpretation
The failure is not a retrieval-row breakage: held-out recall is preserved and no selected rows are broken by the residual. The problem is continuous transition/delta generalization. Train-only residual gains are optimistic and do not certify held-out improvement.
